title: Codex code-review output
description: Structured findings from a codex-action review pass. Consumed by the github-script step that posts the review.

summary.description: 1-3 paragraphs of overall impression. Posted as the review body.

findings.description: Inline findings; one per concrete issue.

path.description: Path relative to repo root. Omit (or null) for findings that aren't location-bound.

line.description: Line number in the file's new content (right side of the diff). Null for non-line-bound findings.

severity.description: P0 = block-merge / critical correctness, P1 = major, P2 = minor, P3 = nit. Follows Codex's own scale so the review-journal severity_patterns match without remapping.

body.description: Markdown body with rationale and (where possible) a concrete suggested fix.

category.description: Free-form tag the journal will store as `finding_category`. Examples: 'concurrency/race', 'api/contract', 'tests/missing-edge'.
